---
title: Reproduction du Bain de Berthe Morisot
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784039639/berthemorisot_wjz3ij.png
description: Reproduction du bain de Berthe Morisot
categories: ["generalillustration"]
date: 2025-11-30
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784039639/berthemorisot_wjz3ij.png)
